privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Thank you for visiting Zaheen.com.pk. At Zaheen, we are committed to protecting your privacy and safeguarding your personal information.
privacy.personalInfoText: When you visit our website we may collect personal information such as your name, email address, and phone number.
privacy.usageInfoText: We may collect non-personal information such as IP address, browser type and operating system.
privacy.cookiesText: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience and understand website usage.
privacy.provideServicesText: We use your information to deliver services and features on the platform.
privacy.communicationText: We may contact you about updates, services or offers.
privacy.improveSiteText: We analyze usage data to improve our platform.
privacy.marketingText: With your consent we may send promotional offers.
privacy.sharingText: We do not sell your data but may share with trusted partners for service delivery.
privacy.securityText: We take reasonable measures to protect your personal information.
privacy.thirdPartyText: We are not responsible for privacy practices of third-party sites.
privacy.changesText: We may update this policy from time to time.
privacy.contactText: If you have questions about this policy please contact us:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Thank you for using Zaheen.com.pk. These Terms of Service govern your use of the website. By accessing or using the website you agree to comply with these terms.
terms.ageRequirement: You must be at least 18 years old to use this website.
terms.lawfulUse: You agree to use the website only for lawful purposes and not to violate the rights of others.
terms.accountInfo: You may be required to create an account and provide accurate information.
terms.accountSecurity: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account.
terms.ipText: All content on this website is the property of Zaheen and protected by copyright laws.
terms.liabilityText: Zaheen shall not be liable for any damages arising from use of the website.
terms.changesText: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time.
terms.lawText: These terms are governed by the laws of Pakistan.
terms.contactText: If you have questions regarding these terms please contact us:
